Defines the firmware base address for the STM32F4 microcontroller platform.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a macro `FIRMWARE_BASE` which calculates the base address for firmware in memory. It includes the header file `stm32f4xx.h`, which suggests that the code is intended for use with STM32F4 microcontrollers. The macro `FIRMWARE_BASE` is computed by adding `BOOTLOADER_LENGTH` to `FLASH_BASE`, indicating that it is used to determine the starting address of the firmware after the bootloader in the flash memory. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once during compilation to prevent duplicate definitions.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stm32f4xx.h`
